name: libero
short_effect: Libero changes the Pokémon's type to that of its previously used attack.
effect_text: Changes the Pokémon’s type to the type of the move it’s about to use. This works only once each time the Pokémon enters battle.
flavor_text: Changes the Pokémon's type to the type of the move it's about to use. This works only once each time the Pokémon enters battle.
